name: ENVIROLEACH TECHN.  O.N.
summary: ENVIROLEACH TECHN. O.N. is a Canadian company focused on the development and commercialization of environmentally friendly technologies for the mining industry. Their primary focus is on developing and patenting hydrometallurgical processes for the recovery of precious metals from ores, concentrates, and electronic waste. The company aims to provide sustainable and efficient solutions for resource extraction, headquartered in Canada.
